description: AI-powered scheduling assistant using Claude API for natural language interaction with clinic context

context.dependencies: Sprint 02 must be complete — JwtAuthGuard, RolesGuard and @Roles() already exist

prompts.name: install-anthropic-sdk
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/package.json and check what is already in the dependencies. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md.

Update apps/api/package.json:
- Add '@anthropic-ai/sdk': '^0.36.0' to the dependencies object (not devDependencies)
- Do NOT modify any other field, script, jest config, or existing dependency
- Preserve all existing formatting and field order

After updating the file, run: cd apps/api && npm install

If '@anthropic-ai/sdk' is already in dependencies, make no changes.

prompts.name: chat-schemas
prompts.description: Create ChatSession and ChatMessage Mongoose schemas with MessageRole enum

prompts.name: chat-dtos
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing class or field. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

All DTO fields must be readonly.

Create apps/api/src/chat/dto/create-session.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- clinicId?: string — @IsMongoId() @IsOptional() — optional clinic context for the session

Create apps/api/src/chat/dto/send-message.dto.ts if it does not already exist:
- content: string — @IsString() @MinLength(1)

Import validators from 'class-validator'. If any file already exists with the correct content, make no changes.

prompts.name: chat-service
prompts.description: Create ChatService with conversation history management and Claude API integration

prompts.name: chat-controller
prompts.description: Create ChatController — all endpoints require authentication, no role restrictions
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read apps/api/src/chat/chat.controller.ts if it exists and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing method or decorator. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Import from the correct canonical paths — do NOT recreate any of these:
- JwtAuthGuard from '../auth/guards/jwt-auth.guard'
- CurrentUser from '../common/decorators/current-user.decorator'
- ChatService from './chat.service'
- CreateSessionDto from './dto/create-session.dto'
- SendMessageDto from './dto/send-message.dto'
- ChatSessionDocument from './schemas/chat-session.schema'
- ChatMessageDocument from './schemas/chat-message.schema'

Create apps/api/src/chat/chat.controller.ts:

@Controller('chat')
@UseGuards(JwtAuthGuard)
export class ChatController

No @Roles restrictions — all authenticated users (any role) can use the chat.

Endpoints:
- POST /chat/sessions — async createSession(@Body() dto: CreateSessionDto, @CurrentUser() userId: string): Promise<ChatSessionDocument>
- GET /chat/sessions — async listSessions(@CurrentUser() userId: string): Promise<ChatSessionDocument[]>
- POST /chat/sessions/:sessionId/messages — async sendMessage(@Param('sessionId') sessionId: string, @Body() dto: SendMessageDto, @CurrentUser() userId: string): Promise<ChatMessageDocument>
- GET /chat/sessions/:sessionId/messages — async listMessages(@Param('sessionId') sessionId: string): Promise<ChatMessageDocument[]>

Controllers contain no business logic — only receive, delegate to ChatService, and return.

prompts.name: chat-module-and-app
prompts.description: Create ChatModule and register it in AppModule
prompts.request:
Before making any changes, read the existing files listed if they exist and check what is already implemented. Do not duplicate any existing import or module registration. Follow all conventions defined in medicano_crew/docs/CONVENTIONS.md. Check medicano_crew/docs/specs/feature-registry.md to understand what already exists.

Create apps/api/src/chat/chat.module.ts if it does not already exist:
- @Module({
    imports: [
      MongooseModule.forFeature([
        { name: ChatSession.name, schema: ChatSessionSchema },
        { name: ChatMessage.name, schema: ChatMessageSchema },
      ]),
      ConfigModule,
    ],
    controllers: [ChatController],
    providers: [ChatService],
  })
  export class ChatModule
- Import ChatSession, ChatSessionSchema from './schemas/chat-session.schema'
- Import ChatMessage, ChatMessageSchema from './schemas/chat-message.schema'
- Import ConfigModule from '@nestjs/config' — needed so ChatService can inject ConfigService

Update apps/api/src/app.module.ts:
- Add import of ChatModule from './chat/chat.module'
- Add ChatModule to the imports array
- Do NOT remove or modify any existing imports, modules, or configuration

If chat.module.ts already exists with correct content, make no changes to it.

prompts.name: chat-tests
prompts.description: Unit tests for ChatService with mocked Anthropic client — never call the real API
